headline: Winners And Losers Of Q1: Copart (NASDAQ:CPRT) Vs The Rest Of The Business Services & Supplies Stocks
summary: As the Q1 earnings season comes to a close, it’s time to take stock of this quarter’s best and worst performers in the business services & supplies industry, including Copart (NASDAQ:CPRT) and its peers.
